# DimensionRegistry Class

> [!CAUTION]
> This class is still in pre-release.  Its signature may change or it may be removed in future releases.

Provides the functionality for registering custom dimensions. Custom dimensions can only be registered during the system startup event.

## Methods
- [registerCustomDimension](#registercustomdimension)

### **registerCustomDimension**
`
registerCustomDimension(typeId: string): void
`

Registers a new custom dimension type. Must be called during the system startup event. The dimension will be created using the void generator.

#### **Parameters**
- **typeId**: *string*
  
  The namespaced identifier for the custom dimension (e.g., 'mypack:my_dimension'). Must include a namespace and use only valid identifier characters.
  
Notes:
- This function can be called in early-execution mode.
- This function can throw errors.
  - Throws [*CustomDimensionAlreadyRegisteredError*](CustomDimensionAlreadyRegisteredError.md), [*CustomDimensionInvalidRegistryError*](CustomDimensionInvalidRegistryError.md), [*CustomDimensionNameError*](CustomDimensionNameError.md), [*CustomDimensionReloadNewDimensionError*](CustomDimensionReloadNewDimensionError.md), [*@minecraft/common.EngineError*](../../../scriptapi/minecraft/common/EngineError.md), [*NamespaceNameError*](NamespaceNameError.md)
